emails.subject: Re: Procter & Gamble
emails.body: Do you want them to trade financial online? Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 01/22/2001 11:52 AM Stephanie Sever 01/22/2001 11:43 AM

emails.subject: Re: Procter & Gamble
emails.body: It is a legal issue, not a credit one. They have refused to accept our no reliance language in past negotiations. From a pure credit view, they are AA rated. I think Carol was involved in the last round of negotiaitons, Tanya From: Tana Jones on 01/22/2001 11:53 AM
